# Niger Delta

**Summary**: A major sedimentary basin in Nigeria.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-sanuade|Sanuade, 2015]] studied the Niger Delta to understand its clastic wedge evolution.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2015-sanuade|Sanuade, 2015]] sedimentary basin

## Formations Present

- [[2015-sanuade|Sanuade, 2015]] Akata, Agbada, Benin

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Niger Delta is a clastic wedge 12 km thick with an area of 75,000 km2. ([[2015-sanuade|Sanuade, 2015, p. 21]])
